original_image_tags: A scan of the back of a thin, translucent paper page, possibly onion skin or carbon copy paper. The paper has two hole-punch holes at the top. The page is largely blank but shows faint, reversed text bleeding through from the other side. At the bottom, there is a purple stamped timestamp and label, printed upside down relative to the main page orientation.

elements.description: Page shows a faint reverse imprint of typed text on the front side, two dark circular hole punches at the top, and a purple stamped text reading 'DEC 13 3 53 PM '48' and 'TRANSMITTED' at the bottom.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the visual content: two hole punches at the top, faint reversed text, and a purple stamped label at the bottom.
